docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKS, MECHELLE ANGELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKS, MECHELLE ANGELA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROOKS, MECHELLE ANGELA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,021.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
